name: Chile Con Carne Para Tamales (Chile-meat Filling)
recipeIngredient: 1 1/2 pounds beef or pork, reserve liquid
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the meat and lard in a large skillet. Fry the meat at medium heat until browned.
2. Add the flour to the meat and cook for 1 minute, stirring constantly.
3. Stir in the chile powder, broth, and seasonings.
4. Cook at medium heat for approximately 30 minutes, stirring constantly until the mixture has thickened.
